subcodes.first_line: O Ibn Abhar! O thou who gazest upon the Most Great Scene! The Lord of Power maketh mention of thee in this station [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن ابهر یا ایها الناظر الی المنظر الاکبر یذکرک مالک القدر فی هذا المقام
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @limits of the intellect, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love and unity, @empty learning; false spirituality
